<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1920 850" font-family="'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <!-- CSS Styles & Animations -->
    <style>
      @keyframes spin {
        0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
        100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
      }
      @keyframes pulse {
        0% { opacity: 0.3; }
        50% { opacity: 0.8; }
        100% { opacity: 0.3; }
      }
      @keyframes flowData {
        0% { stroke-dashoffset: 24; }
        100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
      }
      .rotating-shaft {
        animation: spin 1.5s linear infinite;
        transform-origin: 409px 121px;
      }
      .data-pulse {
        animation: pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      .data-line {
        stroke-dasharray: 4 4;
        animation: flowData 2s linear infinite;
      }
      .card-panel {
        filter: drop-shadow(0px 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4));
      }
      .sensor-badge {
        filter: drop-shadow(0px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.6));
      }
    </style>

    <!-- Global Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#060d1a"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#03070e"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <linearGradient id="cardGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#111c30"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#0a101d"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="cardHeader" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#061020"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#0d1b31"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Motor Texture Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="motorBody" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#4a5a80"/>
      <stop offset="0.2" stop-color="#60739c"/>
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#344363"/>
      <stop offset="0.8" stop-color="#232e47"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#161f33"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="statorFin" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#55668a"/>
      <stop offset="0.3" stop-color="#3f4d6e"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1c2538"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="endBellGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#283552"/>
      <stop offset="0.3" stop-color="#4b5e87"/>
      <stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#344566"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1c263b"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="shaftGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#94a3b8"/>
      <stop offset="0.3" stop-color="#f1f5f9"/>
      <stop offset="0.6" stop-color="#64748b"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#334155"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="jboxGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#475569"/>
      <stop offset="0.2" stop-color="#64748b"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1e293b"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="basePlateGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#334155"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#0f172a"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Master Realistic Motor Template -->
    <g id="master-motor">
      <!-- Ground Base Plate -->
      <path d="M 30 185 L 386 185 L 396 193 L 20 193 Z" fill="url(#basePlateGrad)" stroke="#0f172a"/>
      <rect x="45" y="176" width="54" height="9" fill="#475569" stroke="#1e293b" rx="2"/>
      <circle cx="55" cy="180" r="2.5" fill="#0f172a"/>
      <circle cx="89" cy="180" r="2.5" fill="#0f172a"/>
      <rect x="316" y="176" width="54" height="9" fill="#475569" stroke="#1e293b" rx="2"/>
      <circle cx="326" cy="180" r="2.5" fill="#0f172a"/>
      <circle cx="360" cy="180" r="2.5" fill="#0f172a"/>

      <!-- Data Telemetry Conduits (Visual Detail) -->
      <path d="M 81 121 L 81 55 L 180 55" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="1.5" class="data-line" opacity="0.6"/>
      <path d="M 208 121 L 208 55 L 180 55" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="1.5" class="data-line" opacity="0.6"/>
      <path d="M 335 121 L 335 55 L 236 55" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="1.5" class="data-line" opacity="0.6"/>

      <!-- Main Stator Housing Slab -->
      <rect x="66" y="66" width="284" height="110" rx="6" fill="url(#motorBody)" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="2"/>
      
      <!-- Stator Cooling Fins (3D Extrusion Effect) -->

        <rect x="76" y="86" width="264" height="8" fill="url(#statorFin)" rx="2"/>
        <rect x="76" y="98" width="264" height="8" fill="url(#statorFin)" rx="2"/>
        <rect x="76" y="110" width="264" height="8" fill="url(#statorFin)" rx="2"/>
        <rect x="76" y="122" width="264" height="8" fill="url(#statorFin)" rx="2"/>
        <rect x="76" y="134" width="264" height="8" fill="url(#statorFin)" rx="2"/>
        <rect x="76" y="146" width="264" height="8" fill="url(#statorFin)" rx="2"/>
        <rect x="76" y="158" width="264" height="8" fill="url(#statorFin)" rx="2"/>
      </g>
      <!-- Housing Support Bands -->
      <rect x="116" y="65" width="16" height="112" fill="#334155" stroke="#1e293b"/>
      <rect x="284" y="65" width="16" height="112" fill="#334155" stroke="#1e293b"/>

      <!-- Terminal / Junction Box -->
      <rect x="175" y="38" width="66" height="28" rx="4" fill="url(#jboxGrad)" stroke="#0f172a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <path d="M 181 44 L 235 44 L 235 58 L 181 58 Z" fill="#334155" stroke="#1e293b"/>
      <!-- Warning plate on Jbox -->
      <polygon points="218,48 226,54 210,54" fill="#fbbf24"/>

      <!-- NDE End Bell (Left) -->
      <path d="M 66 74 C 54 74 44 80 44 94 L 44 148 C 44 162 54 168 66 168 Z" fill="url(#endBellGrad)" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="2"/>
      <ellipse cx="56" cy="121" rx="6" ry="25" fill="#1e293b" opacity="0.5"/>
      <!-- Fan Shroud Louvers -->
      <line x1="48" y1="105" x2="48" y2="137" stroke="#0f172a" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <line x1="53" y1="100" x2="53" y2="142" stroke="#0f172a" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>

      <!-- DE End Bell (Right) -->
      <path d="M 350 74 C 362 74 372 80 372 94 L 372 148 C 372 162 362 168 350 168 Z" fill="url(#endBellGrad)" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="2"/>
      <!-- Drive End Flange Collar -->
      <rect x="372" y="96" width="16" height="50" rx="3" fill="url(#jboxGrad)" stroke="#0f172a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <!-- Grease fitting / seal detail -->
      <circle cx="380" cy="121" r="14" fill="none" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      
      <!-- Output Shaft (Animated) -->
      <g transform="translate(0, 0)">
        <rect x="388" y="112" width="28" height="18" fill="url(#shaftGrad)" stroke="#0f172a" stroke-width="1" rx="2"/>
        <line x1="392" y1="116" x2="412" y2="116" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
        <!-- Rotating Shaft Coupling Marker -->
        <g class="rotating-shaft">
          <circle cx="409" cy="121" r="8" fill="#334155" stroke="#0f172a" stroke-width="1"/>
          <circle cx="409" cy="116" r="2.5" fill="#fbbf24"/>
          <circle cx="409" cy="126" r="2.5" fill="#0f172a"/>
        </g>
      </g>

      <!-- Labels -->
      <text x="55" y="44" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="1" text-anchor="middle">NDE</text>
      <text x="380" y="44" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="1" text-anchor="middle">DE</text>
    </g>
  </defs>

  <!-- APP BACKGROUND -->
